Anti-Gravity Technology

Anti-Gravity Carbon Plate

A precision carbon fiber propulsion plate stores and releases energy to create lift-like forward momentum and explosive stride return.

Zero-Pressure Air Mesh

Breathable mesh upper reduces pressure and channels airflow to create a light, floating comfort sensation.

Micro-Robotic Stability System
